Patch Set 1:

Its a demo task for flavor Changes introduction in the Resource Limit, Please check and suggest if these changes need to be replicated in others as well,
As of now, We are getting one optimum values from project team, We can define a Max (Large) Limit for same and for the components which we are not getting any values, We can define two optimum ranges for anyone to install using this segregation.

Patch Set 3:

Hello all,

For this task:-

Now, We can see (Many new sub charts added for SO) Which contains their specific defined Resource limit,  

So Do we want to introduce segregation of flavor in same?
We can use the given values as Small flavor and put the same as by default in order to keep it as it is and can give Large Flavor with high config liberty, Please let me know your views?

BR/
VC

Patch Set 5:

1) Merge Conflict has been resolved.
2) Introduced Flavor Functionality to enable any operator to have container sizing also wrt environment development/production.
   Where Small= Default Flavor provided by Project team.
         Large= High Values than Small
